name: configure
description:
Sets, retrieves, or removes API tokens for any service connector using the system keyring. Run once per service — credentials persist across sessions and MCP clients.
Use when: user needs to save a GitHub token, OpenAI key, or any other API credential for use by other tools.
Scope: local machine keyring (or ~/.config/agentic-store/tokens.json fallback on headless systems).
Not for: listing available tools (use tool_search) or testing if a connection works (use the webapp connector test).

action.description: Action to perform. 'set': store a token. 'get': retrieve a token value. 'remove': delete a token. 'list': show all service names with stored tokens (no values shown).

service.description: Service name to operate on. Use connector_field format: 'github_token', 'openai_api_key', 'anthropic_api_key', 'linear_api_key'. Required for set, get, remove.

token.description: The token or API key value to store. Required only for the 'set' action.
